name: concerttracker
description: Concert tracker with server-side API proxying for Ticketmaster, Bandsintown, Spotify, and Deezer.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const files=['server/index.js','api/index.js']; (function walk(dir){ for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})) { const full=dir+'/'+entry.name; if (entry.isDirectory()) walk(full); else if (full.endsWith('.js')) files.push(full); } })('client/assets/app'); for (const file of files) cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',file],{stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('syntax ok');"
